waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.description: Emails of users interested in the Founder Plan during Alpha phase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user joined the waitlist.

source.description: Where the user signed up from (e.g., 'hero', 'pricing').

referral.description: ID of the user who referred this entry.

referralCount.description: Number of users referred by this entry.

initialRank.description: Position in the queue when the user joined.

waitlistCount.description: Total number of users in the waitlist.
